name: QUANTA SERVICES, INC.
business: Quanta Services, Inc. is a leading provider of comprehensive infrastructure solutions for the electric and gas utility, power generation, large load center, manufacturing, communications, pipeline and energy industries, providing design, engineering, procurement, construction, upgrade and repair and maintenance services.

exposures.sentence: the investment of capital into the build out of data centers by technology customers in order to, among other things, expand cloud-based services and develop artificial intelligence (AI) training and inference, increases demand for our solutions offerings.
